# glitchtip_project_alert (List Resource)

Lists existing GlitchTip project alerts in a project for `terraform query`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization that owns the project.
- `project` (String) Slug of the project whose alerts are listed.
